name: Coke Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can (8 oz) Dark sweet cherries, halved
1 can (12 fl oz) Crushed pineapple with coconut, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the juice from the cherries and crushed pineapple, then add enough water to make 2 cups of liquid.
2. Heat the liquid mixture until it reaches a boiling point.
3. Pour the boiling liquid over the Cherry Jello and stir until the jello is completely dissolved.
4. Add the halved cherries, crushed pineapple with coconut, pecans, and Cokes to the jello mixture.
5. Chill the salad in the refrigerator until it has set.
Randy Rigg
